sourceMovie.title: Good Luck Chuck
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Good Luck Chuck works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: There's Something About Mary
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Good Luck Chuck clicked for you, There's Something About Mary (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Good Luck Chuck?
faq.answer: Try There's Something About Mary, My Best Friend's Wedding, Shall We Dance?—each shares DNA with Good Luck Chuck while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Good Luck Chuck?
faq.answer: Good Luck Chuck (2007) is best described as Comedy, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Good Luck Chuck worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
